decoded.meaning: FWD{ op=READ, dst=/sensor/temp, FIELD :data[*] (index_mode=WILDCARD), src=/reply-ep } — a [*] wildcard on a non-subscriber-path data target
decoded.note: RFC-0004 §C: a valid, round-trip-safe FWD/FIELD frame at the CODEC layer (the 3-core conformance machine stays green). At the slice-2 RESOLUTION layer it MUST be rejected with a kind=ERROR reply STATUS=ERROR(INVALID_PATH=0x03): [*] is legal only on a subscriber-path. See ADR-0035 slice 2 validation.
